description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build_image that uses the docker:git Docker image and the docker:dind service. Define a variable FLUTTER_VERSION (default empty) and set the job to run manually. In the job script, echo the FLUTTER_VERSION, log in to registry.gitlab.com with the CI_BUILD_TOKEN, build a Docker image using --build-arg FLUTTER_VERSION=$FLUTTER_VERSION and tag it as registry.gitlab.com/germansaprykin/flutter-docker:$FLUTTER_VERSION, then push the image to the GitLab Container Registry. The job runs in the default stage (test) and has no additional caches or artifacts.
